sentences.target: Je cherche une épée pour le cosplay.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn epe puʁ lə kɔs.plɛ/

translations.fr: Je cherche une épée pour le cosplay.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn epe puʁ lə kɔs.plɛ/
translations.en: I'm looking for a sword for cosplay.
translations.es: Busco una espada para hacer cosplay.
translations.de: Ich suche ein Schwert für Cosplay.
translations.it: Sto cercando una spada per il cosplay.
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma espada para fazer cosplay.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một thanh kiếm để cosplay.
translations.ar: أبحث عن سيف من أجل الكوسبلاي.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een zwaard voor cosplay.
translations.hi: मैं कॉसप्ले के लिए एक तलवार ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter et sverd til cosplay.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ett svärd för cosplay.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter et sværd til cosplay.
translations.ja: コスプレ用の剣を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive, selects a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for the noun 'épée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement phrase ('pour le cosplay').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'cosplay'.
Borrowed common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On pratique avec l'épée au club d'escrime.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁatik avɛk lepe o klœb dɛs.kʁim/

translations.fr: On pratique avec l'épée au club d'escrime.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁatik avɛk lepe o klœb dɛs.kʁim/
translations.en: We practice with the épée at the fencing club.
translations.es: Practicamos con la espada en el club de esgrima.
translations.de: Wir trainieren mit dem Degen im Fechtclub.
translations.it: Ci alleniamo con la spada nel club di scherma.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在击剑俱乐部用重剑练习。
translations.yue: 我哋喺擊劍俱樂部用重劍練習。
translations.ru: Мы тренируемся со шпагой в клубе фехтования.
translations.pt: Praticamos com a espada no clube de esgrima.
translations.he: אנחנו מתאמנים עם דקר במועדון סיף.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi luyện tập với kiếm épée ở câu lạc bộ đấu kiếm.
translations.ar: نتدرب على الإيبيه في نادي المبارزة.
translations.nl: We oefenen met de degen bij de schermclub.
translations.uk: Ми тренуємося зі шпагою в клубі фехтування.
translations.hi: हम फेंसिंग क्लब में एपे से अभ्यास करते हैं।
translations.el: Κάνουμε προπόνηση με επέ στο σύλλογο ξιφασκίας.
translations.nb: Vi trener med kårde på fekteklubben.
translations.id: Kami berlatih dengan epee di klub anggar.
translations.sv: Vi tränar med värja på fäktklubben.
translations.ro: Exersăm cu spada la clubul de scrimă.
translations.cs: Trénujeme s kordem v šermířském klubu.
translations.da: Vi træner med kårde i fægteklubben.
translations.ja: フェンシングクラブでエペで練習します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; here with prepositional complements.
Preposition introducing the instrument/comitative phrase.
Definite article elided before vowel-initial noun; feminine singular determiner for 'épée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.
Fused preposition+article (à + le); introduces the locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au'.
Preposition 'de' elided before vowel; introduces a genitive/nominal complement.
Common noun; complement of 'club' in the noun phrase 'club d'escrime'.

sentences.target: Cette épée date du Moyen Âge.

translations.fr: Cette épée date du Moyen Âge.
translations.en: This sword dates from the Middle Ages.
translations.es: Esta espada data de la Edad Media.
translations.de: Dieses Schwert stammt aus dem Mittelalter.
translations.zh-Hans: 这把剑可以追溯到中世纪。
translations.yue: 呢把劍可以追溯到中世紀。
translations.pt: Esta espada data da Idade Média.
translations.vi: Thanh kiếm này có từ thời Trung Cổ.
translations.ar: هذا السيف يعود إلى العصور الوسطى.
translations.nl: Dit zwaard stamt uit de Middeleeuwen.
translations.hu: Ez a kard a középkorból származik.
translations.hi: यह तलवार मध्य युग की है।
translations.el: Αυτό το σπαθί χρονολογείται από τον Μεσαίωνα.
translations.id: Pedang ini berasal dari Abad Pertengahan.
translations.sv: Det här svärdet είναι från medeltiden.
translations.ro: Această sabie datează din Evul Mediu.
translations.ja: この剣は中世のものです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'épée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of 'date'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive with fixed preposition ('dater de').
Fused preposition+article (de + le); here in 'dater de' meaning 'from the'.
Adjective modifying 'Âge'; part of the fixed expression 'Moyen Âge'.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase 'Moyen Âge', object of 'du'.

sentences.target: Je dois ranger l'épée dans le fourreau.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa ʁɑ̃ʒe lepe dɑ̃ lə fuʁo/

translations.fr: Je dois ranger l'épée dans le fourreau.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa ʁɑ̃ʒe lepe dɑ̃ lə fuʁo/
translations.en: I have to put the sword in the sheath.
translations.es: Tengo que guardar la espada en la vaina.
translations.de: Ich muss das Schwert in die Scheide stecken.
translations.it: Devo mettere la spada nel fodero.
translations.ru: Мне нужно убрать меч в ножны.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que colocar a espada na bainha.
translations.he: אני צריך לשים את החרב בנדן.
translations.vi: Tôi phải cho thanh kiếm vào bao kiếm.
translations.ar: يجب أن أضع السيف في الغمد.
translations.nl: Ik moet het zwaard in de scheде doen.
translations.uk: Мені треба покласти меч у піхви.
translations.hu: Be kell tennem a kardot a hüvelybe.
translations.hi: मुझे तलवार को म्यान में रखना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να βάλω το σπαθί στη θήκη.
translations.nb: Jeg må legge sverdet i sliren.
translations.id: Saya harus memasukkan pedang ke dalam sarung.
translations.sv: Jag måste lägga svärdet i skidan.
translations.ro: Trebuie să pun sabia în teacă.
translations.da: Jeg skal lægge sværdet i skeden.
translations.ja: 剣を鞘に収めなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal verb, present indicative 1st person singular; selects an infinitive complement ('ranger').
Infinitive verb; complement of 'dois' expressing the action to perform.
Definite article elided before vowel-initial noun; feminine singular determiner for 'épée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ranger'.
Preposition introducing a locative/complement ('dans le fourreau').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'fourreau'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.
